subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Praise be to God that thou art inebriated from the cup of the Covenant, and in the assemblage of the friends thou art a wine-loving cupbearer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حمد خدا را که از جام پیمان سرمستی و در انجمن یاران ساقی می پرست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
